zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Fitton於1399年出生在英國英格蘭爾加福斯沃斯時，她的父親Sir Lawrence Fitton24歲，母親Lady Agnes Hesketh25歲。她和Ralph Grosvenor至少有1個兒子和7個女兒。她去世於1486年在英國英格蘭爾享年87歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾洛維爾 奧福。

nameMeanings.name: Fitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English fiton, fittin ‘lie, falsehood’, for a lier or cheat.

possibly a habitational name from Fitton Hall in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, named in Anglo-Scandinavian as ‘settlement by the meadow-land’, from Old English tūn + Old Norse fit, a term denoting grassland on the bank of a river.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Fitton was born in 1399, in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Lawrence Fitton, was 24 and her mother, Lady Agnes Hesketh, was 25. She had at least 1 son and 7 daughters with Ralph Grosvenor. She died in 1486, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 87, and was buried in Lower Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Fitton est née en 1399, à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Lawrence Fitton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Hesketh, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles avec Ralph Grosvenor. Elle est décédée en 1486, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterrée à Lower Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie starb 1486 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lower Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Fittonが1399年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアガウスウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Lawrence Fittonは24歳，母Lady Agnes Heskethは25歳であった。彼女はRalph Grosvenorとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1486年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで87歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアロウエル ペオバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Fitton(이)가 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 가w스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Lawrence Fitton(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Agnes Hesketh(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Ralph Grosvenor(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1486년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 로어 프오버에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Fitton родилась в 1399 г. в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Lawrence Fitton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Hesketh, 25. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей от Ralph Grosvenor. Она умерла в 1486 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 87 лет и была похоронена в местности лоуир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
